name: Trobec's School Bus Svc
officers: Trobec family (founded 1938 by Tony & Frances Trobec; later run by next generation; currently led by Trobec sisters)
registry_source: Minnesota Secretary of State business filings (not directly queried online; entity confirmed active via FMCSA + company sources)
notes: FMCSA address (St Joseph, MN) is the newer/main HQ; the input address (413 County Rd 2 S, Saint Stephen, MN) is the historic/original Saint Stephen location. Same operator (Trobec's Bus Service Inc). School bus operation founded 1938; motor coach division added 1963; received interstate authority 1981. Company website states fleet of ~65 school buses across school bus + charter (FMCSA power units of 27 likely reflects interstate motor coach fleet only).

The Lansing address may be a satellite yard / terminal of Illinois School Bus Co (a Lansing IL listing under 'Illinois School Bus Co' exists with phone 708-755-1100). Cook-Illinois Corp owns 18 subsidiaries; none of its listed subsidiary HQs are at the Lansing address. Possible candidates also include Kickert School Bus Line (Lynwood IL, recently sold to First Student Feb 2026) which is nearby Lansing. Match confidence is medium because of the address mismatch - the USDOT record applies to the corporate entity 'Illinois School Bus Company Inc' but the Lansing address may belong to an unrelated local operator. Company in transportation since 1958; Cook-Illinois operates 2,200+ buses across all subsidiaries.
